creator: leres@freebsd.org
text:
I think you'll want to add py-dill as a RUN_DEPENDS:

    zinc 13 @ pylint /dev/null
    Traceback (most recent call last):
      File "/usr/local/bin/pylint", line 33, in <module>
        sys.exit(load_entry_point('pylint==2.13.2', 'console_scripts', 'pylint')())
      File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/pylint/__init__.py", line 19, in run_pylint
        from pylint.lint import Run as PylintRun
      File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/pylint/lint/__init__.py", line 19, in <module>
        from pylint.lint.parallel import check_parallel
      File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/pylint/lint/parallel.py", line 19, in <module>
        import dill
    ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'dill'

setup.cfg specifies dill>=0.2
